# opnsense_quagga_bgp_peer_group (Data Source)

Configure peer groups for BGP.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `default_originate` (Boolean) Enable sending the default route to this peer group.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this peer group.
- `family` (String) The address family for this peer group.
- `listen_ranges` (Set of String) The listen ranges for this peer group.
- `name` (String) The name of the peer group.
- `next_hop_self` (Boolean) Enable next-hop-self for this peer group.
- `prefix_list_in` (String) The prefix list UUID for inbound direction.
- `prefix_list_out` (String) The prefix list UUID for outbound direction.
- `remote_as` (String) The remote AS number for this peer group.
- `remote_as_mode` (String) The remote AS mode for this peer group.
- `route_map_in` (String) The route map UUID for inbound direction.
- `route_map_out` (String) The route map UUID for outbound direction.
- `update_source` (String) The update source interface for this peer group.
